content:
Hi sunfish62

Could you please report your crash on github. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues

Please collect and attach a debug log with the report. See guide linked below. https://thunderbird.github.io/thunderbird-android/docs/latest/user-guide/troubleshooting/collecting-debug-logs.html

content:
Hi Cameron

When you say pointer, are you using some type of stylus. Is the screen touch screen? Does the 3 dot menu work when using your finger?
creator: platform34

content: I'm using a trackpad on a laptop Chromebook, so it's a mouse cursor. The Chromebook happens to have a touchscreen, and the three dot menu works when I touch it with my finger, but not when use the cursor. All other menus and selections work with the cursor.
